name: process_hollowing
help: Process hollowing — inject operator-supplied shellcode into a suspended process
long_help: Spawns <target> in CREATE_SUSPENDED state, parses its PEB / PE headers to locate the entrypoint, flips it RWX, overwrites it with the shellcode bytes supplied via --shellcode (read from the operator's filesystem, packed inline), and resumes the thread. The shellcode inherits the victim's identity and token.

arguments.name: target
arguments.desc: Path to executable to hollow (e.g. C:\Windows\System32\notepad.exe)

arguments.name: shellcode
arguments.desc: Path to raw x64 shellcode file (operator-side, e.g. /tmp/sc.bin)
